---
title: "Young Step-mother, or, A Chronicle of Mistakes, The By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Heartsease,” etc."
---

## Young Step-mother, or, A Chronicle of Mistakes, The By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe,” “Heartsease,” etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1861
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Parker, Son, and Bourn, West Strand.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
